title: Custom Biome Downloader
description: A mod used to save all biomes from a server, including custom ones! Can be used together with a world downloader to get a more accurate world!
body:
### How to Use the Mod:

1. **Join any Minecraft server** (with custom biomes registered via datapacks).
2. **Run the command:** `/save biomes`

   * This command can be executed at any time after joining.
3. **Check the output in chat.**

   * The mod will confirm the name of the file it 

---

### Output File:

* The biome data will be saved as a text file named:
  **`<Server-IP>-BIOMES.txt`**
* This file is located in your `.minecraft/config/` 
---

### What It Does:

* The mod scans and saves **all server-side custom biome information + IDs**.
* Useful for mod or datapack developers who want to:

  * **Analyze** custom biome data.
  * Track which biomes a server is using.

## Great to use in combination with: 
* [CDD](https://modrinth.com/mod/cdd/)
* [CED](https://modrinth.com/mod/ced/)
* [CAD](https://modrinth.com/mod/cad/)
